name: Layne Christensen Company
description: Layne Christensen Company, now a brand under Granite Construction, is a global water management, construction, and drilling company with a history dating back to 1882. The company provides sustainable solutions for water resources and mineral exploration, offering services such as well and pump maintenance, water treatment, pipeline and sewer rehabilitation, and specialty drilling. Serving both public and private sectors throughout North and South America, Layne is recognized for delivering professional and reliable infrastructure solutions while maintaining an enduring commitment to safety, excellence, and integrity in the water, mineral, and energy markets.
